# CareWeave

> Modern home care management platform powered by AI-driven coordination — clients, caregivers, EVV, scheduling, billing, and payroll in one HIPAA-grade workspace.

CareWeave serves Medicare, Medicaid, HCBS, Regional Center, and private-pay home care agencies. Billing and payroll use GPS-verified EVV hours, never scheduled estimates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and primary call to action.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and per-client pricing across personas.
- [Pricing — Medicare, Medicaid & HCBS](/pricing/medicaid): Tier comparison for Medicare, Medicaid, and HCBS providers.
- [Pricing — Private Pay](/pricing/private-pay): Tier comparison for private-pay agencies.
- [Pricing — Regional Center](/pricing/regional-center): Tier comparison for Regional Center providers.
- [Docs](/docs): Architecture, modules, compliance, and how-to guides.
- [Legal](/legal): Terms, privacy, and HIPAA BAA.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Customer login.
- [Start free trial](/signup): 45-day Enterprise trial, no credit card or invite required.
